opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: This black mole on my back just started bleeding onto my shirt today, and it looks completely different than it did a month ago. I'm terrified it's something bad.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It bled on its own today for the first time and it's changed a lot over the last couple of months — my wife made me get it looked at straight away.

symptom_narrative.onset: the spot has been changing for about 8 weeks; the bleeding started today out of nowhere
symptom_narrative.duration: changing over roughly two months, bleeding today
symptom_narrative.character: a dark mole on my upper back that used to be a small flat brown freckle and is now bigger, raised and a mix of colours; today it oozed a bit of blood
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the bleeding itself was only a little but it really frightened me
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: on my upper back, a bit to the left, where I can't really see it well myself
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the changes have been gradual over weeks; the bleeding was a one-off today
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: pressing tissues on it stopped the bleeding
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: I think it caught on my shirt and that set it off
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: it started itching a bit today just before it bled
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: it has never bled before; it was just a plain freckle for years
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm really anxious and can't stop thinking about it, but otherwise I feel well in myself

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spent a lot of time outdoors when younger and got badly sunburnt more than once as a kid

objective_data_offered.value: a dark pigmented spot on the upper back, roughly 8-9 mm, with an uneven notched edge and a mix of black, brown and grey with a reddish rim; the middle looks raised and there is a tiny spot that oozed blood
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described/shown by the patient and their spouse over chat; not a clinician dermoscopic examination

objective_data_offered.value: my other moles and freckles all look plain and similar to each other, but this one stands out and looks different from the rest
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's lay comparison, not a clinician skin examination

objective_data_offered.value: I've pressed a few tissues on it and the bleeding has stopped for now; there's a small spot of blood on my shirt
